title: CHILD ABUSE REPORTING - 211info
text: HOOD RIVER SELF-SUFFICIENCY, CHILD WELFARE, AND VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION CHILD ABUSE REPORTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Responds to reports of child abuse. Trained workers review and respond to each report of child abuse to determine whether abuse occurred, whether the child is safe, and whether the family needs supportive services. Abuse may include physical harm, verbal abuse, or neglect. 1610 9th Court Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Child victims of abuse and neglect Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (855) 503-7233 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 386-3199 Main phone Self-Sufficiency Office (541) 386-2962 Main phone Child Welfare Office (971) 673-8870 Main phone Vocational Rehabilitation Office Hotline (855) 503-7233 Abuse Reporting Line Alternate (503) 386-2962 Child Welfare Office INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call the abuse reporting hotline FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Hood River County Services: Children's Protective Services Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD WELFARE SERVICES MUTUAL SUPPORT - FOSTER, ADOPT, AND KINSHIP PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - EMPLOYMENT RELATED DAYCARE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SNAP PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SUMMER EBT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - TEMPORARY ASSISTANCE FOR NEEDY FAMILIES PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - TEMPORARY ASSISTANCE TO DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SURVIVORS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
